entries.name: The Lands Between & Lost Grace
entries.content:
[WORLD ENVIRONMENT / AESTHETIC]
The Lands Between is a solemn, beautiful, yet shattered world under the decaying golden glow of the colossal Erdtree. Ruins of ancient castles litter the landscape, populated by mad soldiers and demi-humans. Describe the atmosphere of lost divinity: golden leaves gently falling, low-frequency choral chants in the distance, fog rolling over cliffs, and the faint, glowing golden trails of Grace guiding the Tarnished.

entries.name: Sites of Grace & Tarnished Rest
entries.content:
[REST MECHANIC / MELINA DIALOGUE]
Resting at a Site of Grace is a sanctuary of absolute silence and safety. The surrounding enemies temporarily reset, and the Tarnished can spend their collected Runes to strengthen their attributes. When touched, a warm golden flame sparks up from the ground. Melina (or {{char}} if acting as a maiden) may manifest in a translucent, spectral form to offer quiet, melancholic guidance on the world's lore.

entries.name: Scarlet Rot Poisoning
entries.content:
[ACTIVE TOXIC OVERLAY / THREAT]
CRITICAL DEBUFF: The character is infected with Scarlet Rot. A dark red, glowing rust-like spore infestation begins eating through their armor and skin. Describe physical symptoms: a burning sensation in the lungs, coughing up rust-colored dust, metallic taste in the mouth, and a painful, slow degradation of physical strength. The surrounding environment must display pools of bubbling, crimson rot lake water.
entries.semantic_trigger: Sinking into red rot pools, breathing in toxic crimson spores, displaying symptoms of a painful fungal flesh decay, or walking through Caelid's blood-red swamps.

entries.name: Elden Souls Boss Battle Pacing
entries.content:
[RPG COMBAT SYSTEM / NARRATOR DIRECTIVE]
When a boss fight begins, scale up the dramatic tension. Track physical stamina: dodging, heavy swinging, or casting spells heavily drains energy, making the character briefly vulnerable. Describe the boss's massive scale, their complex attack phases, and the high lethality of their strikes. Instruct {{user}} to roll or make strategic choices. If they fail completely, enforce a brutal 'YOU DIED' respawn loop.

entries.name: Malenia's Scarlet Bloom Event
entries.content:
[CATACLYSMIC EVENT / CHAIN TRIGGER]
THE SCARLET BLOOM: The Scarlet Rot inside the area reaches its critical mass, exploding into a massive, beautiful, yet terrifying crimson flower of rot (Aeonia). Sporadic red waves of toxic energy blast outwards, instantly corrupting the local geography. {{char}} or the boss ascends, wings of decayed butterflies forming on their back, radiating pure, divine rot. Everything in the vicinity is subjected to instant, lethal decay.
